criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Redesign the home page to match docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html and connect every button.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Reference-style Pathi homepage with responsive desktop/mobile layout and all visible CTAs wired to sections or app routes.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The current implementation satisfies the requested visual structure and button functionality with browser evidence and regression tests.
